changelog: Initial registry — curated best-in-class models as of March 2025.

general.label: General Purpose
general.description: Everyday AI — answer questions, write emails, brainstorm, summarize.

light.name: Llama 3.2 3B
light.why: Surprisingly capable for its size. Runs fast on any machine.

medium.name: Qwen 2.5 7B
medium.why: Top-rated small model. Beats many models twice its size on benchmarks.

heavy.name: Qwen 2.5 32B
heavy.why: Competes with GPT-4 class models. Excellent at complex tasks.

ultra.name: Llama 3.3 70B
ultra.why: Meta's best open model. Rivals the top commercial models.

coding.label: Coding Assistant
coding.description: Write, debug, and explain code across all programming languages.

light.name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B
light.why: State-of-the-art code generation for its size. Knows 80+ languages.

medium.name: Phi-4 14B
medium.why: Microsoft's reasoning-focused model. Punches way above its weight on code.

heavy.name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B
heavy.why: Best open coding model. Competitive with Copilot-level quality.

reasoning.label: Deep Reasoning
reasoning.description: Complex analysis, math, logic puzzles, step-by-step problem solving.

light.name: DeepSeek R1 8B
light.why: Shows its thinking process. Surprisingly strong at math and logic.

medium.name: DeepSeek R1 14B
medium.why: Sweet spot for reasoning on consumer hardware.

heavy.name: DeepSeek R1 32B
heavy.why: Approaches o1-level reasoning. Excels at multi-step problems.

ultra.name: DeepSeek R1 70B
ultra.why: Full-power reasoning. Competitive with the best commercial models.

creative.label: Creative Writing
creative.description: Stories, blog posts, marketing copy, brainstorming.

light.name: Llama 3.1 8B
light.why: Great at natural-sounding prose and following creative instructions.

medium.name: Gemma 2 9B
medium.why: Google's open model. Excellent at instruction following and creative writing.

heavy.name: Command R 35B
heavy.why: Designed for long-form content and grounded, factual writing.
